title: Suicide Prevention Hotlines * LGBTQ2+ Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Crisis Hotlines > Suicide Prevention Hotlines * LGBTQ2+ Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter LGBTQ2+ Issues Older Adults Transgender Individuals LGBTQ2+ Issues Transgender Individuals Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF THE TREVOR PROJECT TREVOR PROJECT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides crisis intervention, suicide prevention services, peer support, and outside referrals relating to sexual orientation or gender identity issues. Eligibility: Ages 13-24 who identify as lesbian, gay, bisexual, transgender, queer, or questioning Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (866) 488-7386 24 7 Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
